creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter: the repocopy was made Jan 2 but nothing has happened since 
then.  Are you still interested in this port?  At the moment, each build 
on pointyhat is providing a message about it not being connected, and I 
would rather either see the port connected, or delete it, so as to not see 
the message.
